warm-linen.$description: Warm Linen — Page canvas, section backgrounds — the cream that everything is taped onto

press-black.$description: Press Black — Display headlines, body text, card borders, image frames — the dominant ink across all surfaces

paper-white.$description: Paper White — Inset card surfaces, nav sticker fills, reverse type on dark or red panels

tape-gray.$description: Tape Gray — Subtle surface lift on rare neutral buttons — almost invisible

tomo-red.$description: Tomo Red — Marquee banner background, rubber-stamp text fill, promotional callouts — the single chromatic accent, tomato-toned for a restaurant called TOMO

recife.$description: Display and headline serif — used at extreme sizes (80px+) for the TOMO wordmark and large section titles; weight 300 keeps the high-contrast strokes elegant rather than heavy. Signature voice: if the headline were a voice it would be a whisper in a cathedral

times.$description: Small functional text, timestamps, fine print — the only body-weight serif in the system, used sparingly for texture rather than readability at scale

warm-linen-canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Base page background — the cream that absorbs everything

paper-white.$description: Surface level 1: Sticker labels, inset cards, reverse type panels

tomo-red-marquee.$description: Surface level 2: Promotional ribbon — a surface, not a button
